assertions.text: status_card_present: Response contains the formatted box status card with SPREAD MONITOR header
assertions.evidence: Response contains a full ASCII box card with '║  SPREAD MONITOR — NVDA' header and double-line box drawing characters (╔, ╠, ╚, etc.)

assertions.text: zone_classified: Response clearly states one of the five zones: SAFE, WATCH, WARNING, DANGER, or ACT NOW
assertions.evidence: Card shows '║  Status:  🟢 SAFE ZONE' and assessment text says 'This position is firmly in the Safe Zone'

assertions.text: safe_zone_for_nvda: Response classifies NVDA spread as SAFE ZONE given stock is ~10% above the $155 short strike
assertions.evidence: Stock at $172.70 is 10.25% above the $155 short strike; response explicitly classifies as SAFE ZONE

assertions.text: shows_buffer_pct: Response shows the percentage buffer between current stock price and the short strike
assertions.evidence: Card shows 'Short strike:  $155.00  (buffer: 10.25%)' and assessment text repeats '10.25% above the $155 short strike'

assertions.text: shows_pnl: Response shows current P&L per contract (dollar amount) and loss% of max loss
assertions.evidence: Card shows 'Current P&L:   $0.00  per contract' and 'Loss % of max: 0.0%  of $1,302.00'; assessment confirms '$0.00 of realized P&L' and '$198 of max profit per contract'

assertions.text: actionable_guidance: Response provides zone-appropriate guidance (for SAFE: no action needed, let theta work)
assertions.evidence: 'Suggested action: No action needed — let theta work.' with specific advice to monitor if NVDA drops toward $165–$160 and set a price alert at $160
